Review Throne 2.0?

Throne 2.0 is highly praised for its innovative approach to gifting for content creators, offering a privacy-first platform that enhances fan-to-creator connections. Users appreciate its ease of use, allowing creators to quickly set up wishlists and receive gifts from fans, fostering a deeper personal connection. The platform is commended for its focus on privacy and its potential impact on the creator economy. Many users highlight its convenience and effectiveness, making it a preferred choice for creators and their communities.

results.title: Chestr 🛍: Universal shopping wishlist with discount monitoring | Product Hunt
results.content:
Report

•1 review

Had an amazing experience with chestr! I love the recent addition of discount alerts when you save an item. I was able to save on a pair of shoes that were on my wishlist for a while. I also really like seeing what my friends save, a great way to decide on gifts to get! :)

Chestr 🛍

Chestr 🛍

Great to hear you loved the product, Egle! Thank you so so much 💜

Report

•1 review [...] 5.0

Based on 16 reviews

Review Chestr 🛍?

Reviewers say Chestr makes online shopping far less messy by putting saved items from different stores in one place and cutting the manual work of tracking what to buy later. They repeatedly praise how easy the Chrome extension is to use, its clean UI, and price or discount alerts that help them catch deals and avoid missing items they want. A few also like the social side, such as seeing friends’ saves for gift ideas. Requests are modest: a mobile version, better seasonality insight, and alternate item suggestions.

•1 review

As a busy, chronically online shopping addict, Chestr checks all my boxes. It makes it easy to find things I love amongst a million open tabs and helps me find the best deals without having to scour Google for coupon codes. I’ve been a fan of Chestr since the beginning and it’s quickly become one of my most used apps! (Make a mobile version next!)
